defs: Bound or obligated, as under a pledge to a particular cause, action, or attitude. Opposite of uncommitted.
notes: [Narrower terms: bound up, involved, wrapped up; dedicated, devoted; pledged, sworn]

defs: Associated in an exclusive sexual relationship; also called attached. Opposite of unattached.
notes: [Narrower terms: affianced, bespoken, betrothed, engaged, pledged, promised(predicate); married]

defs: Consigned involuntarily to custody, as in a prison or mental institution.
